sentences.target: On prend un café sur la terrasse.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pʁɑ̃ œ̃ kafe syʁ la tɛʁas/

translations.fr: On prend un café sur la terrasse.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pʁɑ̃ œ̃ kafe syʁ la tɛʁas/
translations.en: We’re having a coffee on the terrace.
translations.es: Estamos tomando un café en la terraza.
translations.de: Wir trinken einen Kaffee auf der Terrasse.
translations.it: Stiamo prendendo un caffè in terrazza.
translations.pt: Estamos tomando um café no terraço.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang uống cà phê ngoài hiên.
translations.nl: We drinken koffie op het terras.
translations.hi: हम टेरेस पर कॉफी पी रहे हैं।
translations.id: Kami sedang minum kopi di teras.
translations.ja: テラスでコーヒーを飲んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (generic/colloquial ‘we’), subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular agreeing with ‘On’.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘café’.
Masculine singular noun, direct object of ‘prend’.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘terrasse’.
Feminine singular noun, object of the preposition ‘sur’ (location).

sentences.target: Je réserve une table en terrasse.

translations.fr: Je réserve une table en terrasse.
translations.en: I’m booking a table on the patio.
translations.es: Estoy reservando una mesa en la terraza.
translations.de: Ich reserviere einen Tisch auf der Terrasse.
translations.it: Sto prenotando un tavolo in terrazza.
translations.pt: Estou reservando uma mesa no terraço.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đặt bàn ngoài hiên.
translations.nl: Ik reserveer een tafel op het terras.
translations.hi: मैं टेरेस पर एक मेज़ बुक कर रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg reserverer et bord på terrassen.
translations.id: Saya sedang memesan meja di teras.
translations.sv: Jag bokar ett bord på terrassen.
translations.da: Jeg reserverer et bord på terrassen.
translations.ja: テラス席を予約しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun, subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘table’.
Feminine singular noun, direct object of ‘réserve’.
Preposition; here part of the set phrase ‘en terrasse’ indicating outdoor seating.
Feminine singular noun; complement of ‘en’ in the fixed locative expression ‘en terrasse’.

sentences.target: Il pleut sur la terrasse ce matin.
sentences.reading: /il plø syʁ la tɛʁas sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Il pleut sur la terrasse ce matin.
translations.ipa: /il plø syʁ la tɛʁas sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: It’s raining on the terrace this morning.
translations.es: Esta mañana está lloviendo en la terraza.
translations.de: Heute Morgen regnet es auf der Terrasse.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天早上露台上在下雨。
translations.ru: Сегодня утром на террасе идет дождь.
translations.pt: Hoje de manhã está chovendo no terraço.
translations.vi: Sáng nay trời mưa ngoài hiên.
translations.ar: هذا الصباح تهطل أمطار على الشرفة.
translations.nl: Vanmorgen regent het op het terras.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вранці на терасі йде дощ.
translations.hu: Ma reggel esik az eső a teraszon.
translations.hi: आज सुबह टेरेस पर बारिश हो रही है।
translations.pl: Dziś rano na tarasie pada deszcz.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί βρέχει στη βεράντα.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig regner det på terrassen.
translations.sv: I morse regnade det på terrassen.
translations.ro: În această dimineață plouă pe terasă.
translations.da: Her til morgen regner det på terrassen.
translations.ja: 今朝はテラスに雨が降っています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun used with weather verbs.
Impersonal verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘terrasse’.
Feminine singular noun, object of ‘sur’ (location).
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifies ‘matin’ in a time expression.
Masculine singular noun; with ‘ce’ forms a temporal adverbial (‘this morning’).

sentences.target: Tu ranges la terrasse avant les invités.
sentences.reading: /ty ʁɑ̃ʒ la tɛʁas avɑ̃ lez ɛ̃vite/

translations.fr: Tu ranges la terrasse avant les invités.
translations.ipa: /ty ʁɑ̃ʒ la tɛʁas avɑ̃ lez ɛ̃vite/
translations.en: You’re tidying the terrace before the guests.
translations.es: Estás ordenando la terraza antes de que lleguen los invitados.
translations.de: Du räumst die Terrasse auf, bevor die Gäste kommen.
translations.it: Stai sistemando la terrazza prima che arrivino gli ospiti.
translations.ko: 손님들이 오기 전에 테라스를 정리하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在客人来之前整理露台。
translations.yue: 你喺客人嚟之前執緊露台。
translations.ru: Ты приводишь террасу в порядок перед приходом гостей.
translations.pt: Você está arrumando o terraço antes da chegada dos convidados.
translations.he: אתה מסדר את המרפסת לפני שהאורחים מגיעים.
translations.vi: Bạn đang dọn dẹp hiên trước khi khách đến.
translations.ar: أنت ترتب الشرفة قبل وصول الضيوف.
translations.nl: Je ruimt het terras op voordat de gasten kommen.
translations.uk: Ти прибираєш терасу перед приходом гостей.
translations.hu: A vendégek érkezése előtt rendbe teszed a teraszt.
translations.hi: मेहमानों के आने से पहले तुम टेरेस साफ कर रहे हो।
translations.el: Τακτοποιείς τη βεράντα πριν έρθουν οι καλεσμένοι.
translations.nb: Du rydder terrassen før gjestene kommer.
translations.id: Kamu sedang merapikan teras sebelum para tamu datang.
translations.sv: Du städar terrassen innan gästerna kommer.
translations.ro: Pui terasa în ordine înainte să vină invitații.
translations.da: Du rydder terrassen, før gæsterne kommer.
translations.ja: お客さんが来る前にテラスを片付けています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Definite article, feminine singular, determiner of ‘terrasse’.
Feminine singular noun, direct object of ‘ranges’.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article, plural, determiner of ‘invités’.
Masculine plural noun; object of the preposition ‘avant’ (temporal reference: before the guests).
